creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 229493
openconnect-devel port

Hi FreeBSD porters,

I submit a new port security/openconnect-devel. This port is pretty similar to security/openconnect, but I try to address the following issues:

security/openconnect port keeps in released version. That is fine and desirable, but the released versions cycle is slow, and since the last release (May 2020) a lot of work in the project have been done: new protocols have been added, as fortinet or f5. I have tested those protocols in the last version of the source code and works great. Therefore, I think that a -devel version should be present in the FreeBSD ports tree. Moreover, I have trying to enable all the possible options in configure (I believe that port options in a -devel version is not appropiate).

Regards
